findings.blocker: Project-external foundational hypothesis: existence of an Albanese variety for a smooth proper geometrically irreducible curve. Three classical routes documented in blueprint (Pic^0 via FGA representability; Sym^g via Stein factorisation; genus-0 via Brauer–Severi + rigidity); each route requires multi-iter Mathlib infrastructure (Hilbert/Quot schemes; symmetric powers of schemes; rigidity theorem $\Hom(\mathbb{P}^1, A) = A(k)$).

next_steps: Kept as the single explicit foundational hypothesis of the project. Per plan-agent decision (iter-117) this is honest disclosure of a project-external mathematical assumption, not deferred-indefinitely loop work. The blueprint chapter `Jacobian.tex` thm:nonempty_jacobianWitness was rewritten this iter to 3-route decomposition with Mathlib gap-map per route. No prover lane scheduled.
